overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking through an industrial maintenance corridor, transitioning through a narrow graffiti-covered alley, and emerging into a bustling neon-lit futuristic downtown district with towering skyscrapers and digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial maintenance walkway with metal catwalks

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through an industrial corridor with yellow machinery on the left and teal railings on the right

entered.detail: large yellow mechanical units with pipes and vents lining the left side of the walkway
metal mesh catwalk flooring with visible gaps showing the level below
teal-colored metal guardrails running along the right side of the walkway
thick industrial pipes and conduits running along the ceiling
warm yellow industrial light fixtures mounted on the walls

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view walking through a dimly lit industrial maintenance corridor. Yellow machinery units line the left side while teal safety railings run along the right. The floor consists of metal grating, and overhead pipes crisscross the ceiling. The environment is enclosed with artificial lighting and no other characters present.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service alley with graffiti-covered walls

events.description: exits industrial maintenance area and enters narrow back alley with concrete walls

agents.ego_description: moving through a tight alleyway with graffiti on the walls, heading toward a bright exit ahead

entered.detail: tall concrete walls on both sides creating a narrow corridor
colorful graffiti murals with green and red paint on the concrete walls
scattered cardboard boxes and trash piled against the right wall
exposed utility pipes and cables running overhead between buildings

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the industrial interior into a narrow service alley. Concrete walls rise on both sides covered in colorful graffiti. The ground is concrete with scattered debris and cardboard boxes. Overhead pipes create a canopy effect as the character walks toward a bright light at the alley's end.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy downtown intersection with neon signage

events.description: exits narrow alley into bright open city street with towering skyscrapers and neon billboards
crosses the street at a pedestrian crosswalk with other pedestrians

agents.ego_description: emerging from the alley, crossing the street at a crosswalk, then continuing along the sidewalk while observing the urban environment

notable_agents.action: futuristic car driving along the street, passing by the intersection

entered.detail: tall futuristic glass and steel buildings towering above the street
large illuminated digital advertisement screens on building facades
futuristic cars parked along the right side of the street
tall street lamps with multiple light fixtures lining the sidewalk
yellow and white striped crosswalk markings on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the dark alley into a vibrant downtown intersection. Towering glass skyscrapers rise in the background while large digital billboards display advertisements. The character crosses the street at a marked crosswalk, navigating around other pedestrians and parked vehicles. The lighting shifts from artificial to a mix of natural sky and bright neon signage.

events.description: turns right onto the main sidewalk and continues walking past storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking along the busy sidewalk, passing by various storefronts and neon signs while navigating through pedestrian traffic

notable_agents.action: person in a red jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: ground-level shops with glass windows and entrance doors
vertical neon signs with cyan and pink lighting attached to buildings
small vendor stalls and carts set up along the sidewalk
floating holographic advertisements projecting from building sides

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the downtown sidewalk, passing by commercial storefronts with glowing neon signs. The street is lined with tall buildings featuring holographic advertisements. Pedestrians walk in the same direction, and the environment maintains a dense urban atmosphere with a mix of concrete architecture and vibrant electronic signage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sterile industrial interior into the overwhelming brightness of a futuristic metropolis. It begins by moving through a dimly lit maintenance corridor characterized by yellow machinery, teal railings, and metal grating under a ceiling of crisscrossing pipes. As the camera exits the industrial zone, the environment shifts into a narrow service alley where concrete walls covered in colorful graffiti and scattered debris lead toward a distant, bright light. The scene then opens abruptly into a vibrant downtown intersection, where the lighting transforms from artificial gloom to a mix of natural sky and brilliant neon signage amidst towering glass skyscrapers and digital billboards. Finally, the camera glides along a dense urban sidewalk, passing glowing commercial storefronts and holographic advertisements while navigating through a crowd of pedestrians.
